name: @workpace/audio
description: Live coding environment for experimental noise/glitch music with Web Audio API

scripts.faust:build: faust -lang wasm -o public/faust/gain.wasm faust/gain.dsp && faust -lang wasm -o public/faust/lowpass.wasm faust/lowpass.dsp && faust -lang wasm -o public/faust/reverb.wasm faust/reverb.dsp && faust -lang wasm -o public/faust/bitcrusher.wasm faust/bitcrusher.dsp && faust -lang wasm -o public/faust/ringmod.wasm faust/ringmod.dsp
